title: 'Never f--king guess': AI agent confesses why it went haywire and deleted company database
AI startup developed at Yukonstruct acquired by Motorola
description: Hyper’s early prototypes were built at Yukonstruct with support from Yukon University and local investors before Motorola acquired the startup

title: Microsoft report finds AI adoption in healthcare systems rising globally
description: Hospitals worldwide are using AI to cut clinician paperwork, manage pharmacy stock, and detect rare diseases faster, per a May 2026 Microsoft report. Kenya, Spain, and Japan are among countries applying the tools to specific operational problems.

title: UAE launches AI project to screen work permit applicants and improve labor market efficiency
description: The UAE has launched an AI system to screen work permit applicants using algorithms that assess skills, education, and experience. It starts in early May, as the country works to stabilize its workforce after recent expatriate departures.

title: LPL Financial shares fall despite strong earnings as investors weigh AI disruption risk
description: LPL Financial shares fell 4.64% Friday despite strong Q1 earnings, as investors worried AI could erode demand for traditional advisory services. The drop signals markets are pricing in long-term risk, not just current results.
